findings.location: sections.select-items-display — radio button HTML output paragraph
findings.description: Knowledge file adds the explanation 'IDは `nablarch_radio1`, `nablarch_radio2`, ... の形式で自動生成' but the source never states that IDs are auto-generated. The source only shows the HTML output with those specific ID values without explaining the generation mechanism.
findings.source_evidence: Source HTML output block for ラジオボタン simply shows `id="nablarch_radio1"`, `id="nablarch_radio2"`, `id="nablarch_radio3"` — no mention of auto-generation.

findings.description: Knowledge file adds 'IDは `nablarch_checkbox1`, `nablarch_checkbox2`, ... の形式で自動生成' but the source never states that IDs are auto-generated. The source only shows the HTML output with those specific ID values.
findings.source_evidence: Source HTML output block for チェックボックス simply shows `id="nablarch_checkbox1"`, `id="nablarch_checkbox2"`, `id="nablarch_checkbox3"` — no mention of auto-generation.

findings.location: sections.hidden-encryption — after the default behavior description
findings.description: Source explicitly states 'このため、アプリケーションプログラマは、hidden暗号化機能に関して実装する必要がない。' (application programmers do not need to implement anything for hidden encryption). This is a practical decision-necessary statement that a developer asking 'what do I need to implement?' would rely on. The knowledge file omits it.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 'デフォルトで全ての :ref:`tag-form_tag` で暗号化を行い、全てのリクエストで復号及び改竄チェックを行う。このため、アプリケーションプログラマは、hidden暗号化機能に関して実装する必要がない。'
